source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Woman: Good morning.
segments.translation: 早上好。

segments.text: Woman: How may I help you?
segments.translation: 有什么可以帮您的吗？

segments.text: Man: Good morning.
segments.translation: 早上好。

segments.text: Man: We spoke on the phone last week, and I'm ringing to get more details about the job.
segments.translation: 我们上周通过电话，我打来是想进一步了解这份工作的详情。

segments.text: Woman: That's right.
segments.translation: 没错。

segments.text: Woman: Thank you for sending in your CV.
segments.translation: 感谢您寄来简历。

segments.text: Woman: We've carefully looked at it, and I think we have several jobs that might suit you.
segments.translation: 我们已经仔细看过了，我觉得有几份工作可能适合您。

segments.text: Man: That's great!
segments.translation: 太好了！

segments.text: Woman: The first one is in a magazine based in North London.
segments.translation: 第一份工作是在一家总部位于伦敦北部的杂志社。

segments.text: Woman: They're looking for a reporter.
segments.translation: 他们正在招聘一名记者。

segments.text: Man: What sort of magazine is it?
segments.translation: 是什么类型的杂志？

segments.text: Woman: They're called Home Solutions, which publishes articles on housing every week, and they want to find someone responsible for collecting the latest news and writing relevant articles.
segments.translation: 杂志名叫《家居解决方案》，每周刊登住房方面的文章。他们想找一个负责收集最新消息并撰写相关文章的人。

segments.text: Man: What are the hours of work?
segments.translation: 工作时间是怎样的？

segments.text: Woman: Well, you will be expected to work forty hours a week, but there may be opportunities to do overtime during busy periods.
segments.translation: 嗯，您每周需要工作40小时，不过在繁忙时期可能有加班的机会。

segments.text: Woman: For example, some may work more than fifty hours a week and get extra pay.
segments.translation: 例如，有些人每周可能工作50多个小时，并获得额外报酬。

segments.text: Woman: But you're not required to do this.
segments.translation: 但这不是强制要求。

segments.text: Man: That's reasonable.
segments.translation: 这很合理。

segments.text: Man: Do you know what the rates of pay are?
segments.translation: 您知道薪资标准是多少吗？

segments.text: Woman: Yes.
segments.translation: 知道。

segments.text: Woman: It says you'll get a monthly pay of 7000 pounds for the first six months.
segments.translation: 上面说，前六个月您的月薪是7000英镑。

segments.text: Woman: And after the probationary period, you'll be eligible for a salary of more than that, maybe 7500 pounds or more.
segments.translation: 试用期结束后，您的薪水会高于这个数，可能是7500英镑或更多。

segments.text: Man: That's good.
segments.translation: 那不错。

segments.text: Woman: So, is that something that might interest you?
segments.translation: 那么，您对这份工作感兴趣吗？

segments.text: Man: It is, yes.
segments.translation: 是的，感兴趣。

segments.text: Man: The only thing is, you say they are in North London, so it would be a pretty long commute for me.
segments.translation: 唯一的问题是，您说他们在伦敦北部，所以对我来说通勤路程会很长。

segments.text: Woman: In that case, the second position might suit you better regarding location.
segments.translation: 既然这样，从地点来看，第二个职位可能更适合您。

segments.text: Woman: That's a researcher for an electronic engineering company in South London.
segments.translation: 那是伦敦南部一家电子工程公司的研究员职位。

segments.text: Man: Yes, that would be a lot closer.
segments.translation: 是的，那就近多了。

segments.text: Woman: Your CV shows you have relevant working experience in this field.
segments.translation: 您的简历显示，您在这个领域有相关工作经验。

segments.text: Man: Yes, I worked in the office of a computer engineering company for two years.
segments.translation: 是的，我曾在一家计算机工程公司的办公室工作过两年。

segments.text: Man: What about the working hours?
segments.translation: 工作时间呢？

segments.text: Woman: For this job, you'll have to work 45 hours a week and the starting salary is 7200 pounds for the six-month probationary period.
segments.translation: 这份工作每周要工作45小时，六个月试用期内的起薪是7200英镑。

segments.text: Man: That should be nice.
segments.translation: 听起来不错。

segments.text: Woman: I can arrange for you an interview if you're interested.
segments.translation: 如果您感兴趣，我可以为您安排面试。

segments.text: Woman: But before that, may I ask where you heard about us?
segments.translation: 不过在此之前，我能问一下您是从哪里知道我们的吗？

segments.text: Woman: Was it in an advert or did your friend tell you?
segments.translation: 是看到广告，还是朋友告诉您的？

segments.text: Man: Neither.
segments.translation: 都不是。

segments.text: Man: It was a website.
segments.translation: 我是在一个网站上看到的。

segments.text: Man: Then I just got your number from the phone book.
segments.translation: 然后我从电话簿里查到了你们的号码。

segments.text: Woman: Oh, right.
segments.translation: 哦，明白了。

segments.text: Woman: Apart from full-time jobs, we have some part-time work that might suit you.
segments.translation: 除了全职工作，我们还有一些可能适合您的兼职工作。

segments.text: Woman: Here several magazines are recruiting part-time writers.
segments.translation: 这里有几家杂志正在招聘兼职撰稿人。

segments.text: Woman: Are you interested?
segments.translation: 您感兴趣吗？

segments.text: Man: What kind of writer exactly?
segments.translation: 具体是哪类撰稿人？

segments.text: Man: I mean, what types of articles should I write about?
segments.translation: 我是说，我应该写哪类文章？

segments.text: Woman: Well, the first one is to do with sports reports.
segments.translation: 嗯，第一份是撰写体育报道。

segments.text: Woman: For this, you're expected to write sports articles twice weekly.
segments.translation: 这份工作要求您每周写两篇体育文章。

segments.text: Man: Well, I love sports.
segments.translation: 嗯，我喜欢体育。

segments.text: Man: I'm a football fan.
segments.translation: 我是个足球迷。

segments.text: Man: But as far as writing is concerned, I'm not entirely keen on that.
segments.translation: 但说到写体育文章，我并不是特别感兴趣。

segments.text: Man: I think I'll rule it out.
segments.translation: 我想我会把它排除掉。

segments.text: Woman: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Woman: Then how about writing something for entertainment?
segments.translation: 那么，写娱乐方面的内容怎么样？

segments.text: Woman: Does it appeal to you?
segments.translation: 这对您有吸引力吗？

segments.text: Man: Entertainment is an exciting topic.
segments.translation: 娱乐是个很有意思的话题。

segments.text: Man: I like reading news or articles in this category, but I'm not sure if I should write something about it.
segments.translation: 我喜欢阅读这一类的新闻或文章，但不确定自己是否应该写这方面的内容。

segments.text: Man: Anyway, I'll think about that.
segments.translation: 不管怎样，我会考虑一下。

segments.text: Man: Could you give me more details?
segments.translation: 您能给我更多详细信息吗？

segments.text: Woman: OK, I've got your email, and I will send the details to you later.
segments.translation: 好的，我有您的电子邮箱，稍后会把详细信息发给您。

segments.text: Man: Thanks.
segments.translation: 谢谢。

segments.text: Woman: And the third one is writing reviews for soap dramas.
segments.translation: 第三份是为肥皂剧撰写评论。

segments.text: Man: Oh, soap drama is my favourite.
segments.translation: 哦，肥皂剧是我的最爱。

segments.text: Man: I worked as a freelance writer in this field three years ago.
segments.translation: 三年前，我曾在这个领域做过自由撰稿人。

segments.text: Man: I think it's pretty worthwhile to give my own opinions and recommendations to the audience.
segments.translation: 我觉得向观众提出自己的看法和建议非常有意义。

segments.text: Woman: That's good.
segments.translation: 那很好。

segments.text: Woman: And the last one is writing articles for a business economy magazine.
segments.translation: 最后一份是为一本商业经济杂志撰写文章。

segments.text: Man: I'm unfamiliar with this field, so I think it might not be easy.
segments.translation: 我不熟悉这个领域，所以觉得可能不太容易。

segments.text: Woman: Don't worry too much.
segments.translation: 不用太担心。

segments.text: Woman: Experience is not essential for this job.
segments.translation: 这份工作并不要求必须有经验。

segments.text: Woman: They've got a training session for every recruit.
segments.translation: 他们会为每位新员工提供培训。

segments.text: Man: That sounds not too bad.
segments.translation: 听起来还不错。

segments.text: Woman: OK, would you like me to send you the pamphlet so that you can learn more about it?
segments.translation: 好的，需要我把宣传册发给您，让您进一步了解吗？

segments.text: Man: That will be nice.
segments.translation: 那太好了。

segments.text: Woman: OK, that's it.
segments.translation: 好的，就这些。

segments.text: Woman: I'll send you all the information later and ...
segments.translation: 稍后我会把所有资料发给您，然后……
